safety_summary: Use the foundation lesson state and settings before moving to workflow operations.
Use the practical lesson state, product repository, and launch readiness before final completion.
Use shared lesson settings and product repository readiness before applied lesson work.
Choose the product stack, write the core documents, and record security assumptions before implementation.
Check changed dependencies, authentication, APIs, storage, deletion, and logging before improving the product.
Confirm service, data movement, OAuth/API permissions, token storage, logging, rate limits, sandbox use, and rollback before implementation.
Keep lesson-repository changes inside the documented as-built and workflow synchronization contracts.
